notes.body:
Each post-it note contains basic information about the game.
 [Left Click] hides a post-it note.
Use [A] and [D] to quickly look between active post-it notes. If you want to permanently hide a post-it note, use [R]

[WASD] lets you move throughout the apartment. Moving the mouse to the edges of the screen changes your view point, and holding [Left Click] at some views lets you look around more.
Hitting [R] lets you interact with doors and work on your assignment while at the desk.

Finish your assignment before the end of the night while not succumbing to nightmares in the apartment.

The Stalker appears in the darkest parts of the apartment and slowly approaches your bedroom.
Use your flashlight [F] to push it back, but avoid overusing it as your flashlight is running low on battery.

Sometimes, you can see a girl appearing outside your window or TV. She is shy and doesn't like being looked at, although she will try to emerge out from her glass and come for you.
Try to block her path with a door before she gets you.

Every now and then, you'll hear faint laughing and notice an object that should not be there.
Make sure to use your flashlight to clear the anomaly in time, before the anomaly comes for you.

Mold can emerge and spread from the dirtiest corners of the apartment.
Spray the patches of mold using [Left Click] to pan at certain views, and [E] to apply your new cleaning solution.
You can let it fester a bit as it doesn't pose a direct threat to your safety, although letting it fester for too long may make your night just a bit longer.
